name: manim-production
description: Production guidance for planning and generating high-quality Manim teaching animations.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, build workflow, and quality rules for Manim animation generation.
interface.longDescription: Provides Manim-focused skills for scene planning, scene building, scene direction, narration alignment, math visualization, and anti-pattern guidance for educational animation tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use the scene-plan skill first and show a visible beat-by-beat plan before coding.
Use the scene-build skill only after the plan exists.
Use the scene-direction, narration-sync, and render-review skills at their respective phases.
Review this Manim scene for pacing, layout, narration quality, and beat structure.
